mnemonics.title: Lattice Laws
mnemonics.content: JAM: Join Associative, Meet Associative. ABsorption connects both operations

mnemonics.title: Hasse Rules
mnemonics.content: No Reflexive, No Transitive, Covering relations only

visualTips.visualization: Imagine 3D structure where 'diamond' shapes can exist but not 'pentagons'
Flat grid-like structure where meets/joins distribute perfectly

analogies.analogy: Family tree where some cousins don't compare
City map with meet=intersection and join=union of paths
